Name: Weft — Deploy Power BI Model
Description: Runs `weft deploy` with the given config and target profile. Binds project variables named WeftParam.* to WEFT_PARAM_* env vars before spawning.

Properties.Octopus.Action.Script.ScriptBody:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

export WEFT_TENANT_ID="#{WeftTenantId}"
export WEFT_SP_CLIENT_ID="#{WeftSpClientId}"
export WEFT_CERT_THUMBPRINT="#{WeftCertThumbprint}"

# Map every project variable named WeftParam.* → WEFT_PARAM_*
for VAR in $(compgen -v | grep '^WeftParam_'); do
  PARAM_NAME="${VAR#WeftParam_}"
  PARAM_VALUE="${!VAR}"
  export "WEFT_PARAM_${PARAM_NAME}=${PARAM_VALUE}"
done

EXTRA_FLAGS=""
if [ "#{WeftAllowDrops}" = "True" ]; then EXTRA_FLAGS="$EXTRA_FLAGS --allow-drops"; fi
if [ "#{WeftNoRefresh}" = "True" ]; then EXTRA_FLAGS="$EXTRA_FLAGS --no-refresh"; fi
if [ "#{WeftResetBookmarks}" = "True" ]; then EXTRA_FLAGS="$EXTRA_FLAGS --reset-bookmarks"; fi

weft deploy \
  --config "#{WeftConfigFile}" \
  --target "#{WeftTargetProfile}" \
  --artifacts "#{WeftArtifactsDir}" \
  --log-format json \
  $EXTRA_FLAGS

Parameters.Name: WeftCertThumbprint
Parameters.Label: Certificate Thumbprint
Parameters.HelpText: Thumbprint of the .pfx installed in the Octopus Tentacle's LocalMachine\My store.

Parameters.Name: WeftConfigFile
Parameters.Label: Config File
Parameters.HelpText: Path to weft.yaml (relative to the deployment working dir).

Parameters.Name: WeftTargetProfile
Parameters.Label: Target Profile
Parameters.HelpText: Profile name from weft.yaml (e.g. dev, uat, prod). Defaults to the Octopus environment name.

Parameters.Name: WeftArtifactsDir
Parameters.Label: Artifacts Directory
Parameters.HelpText: Where Weft writes plan / pre-manifest / post-manifest / receipt JSON.

Parameters.Name: WeftAllowDrops
Parameters.Label: Allow Drops
Parameters.HelpText: Pass --allow-drops. Requires matching profile.allowDrops=true in weft.yaml.

Parameters.Name: WeftNoRefresh
Parameters.Label: Skip Refresh
Parameters.HelpText: Pass --no-refresh. Deploy schema but skip refresh.

Parameters.Name: WeftResetBookmarks
Parameters.Label: Reset Bookmarks
Parameters.HelpText: Pass --reset-bookmarks. Forces full re-check against source on next refresh.
